name: pagination
title: Pagination
description: A beautiful pagination component with multiple variants, colors, and smooth animations.

files.content:
type PaginationColor =
  | "default"
  | "blue"
  | "purple"
  | "pink"
  | "red"
  | "orange"
  | "green"
  | "teal"
  | "cyan"
  | "indigo"
  | "violet"
  | "rose"
  | "amber"
  | "lime"
  | "sky"
  | "emerald"
  | "fuchsia";

type PaginationVariant = "solid" | "outline" | "ghost" | "squircle";

export type { PaginationColor, PaginationVariant };
